name: Tinker AFB
profile: Military-friendly Tinker AFB housing snapshot anchored to Midwest City / Moore / Edmond, built for PCSUnited base-level market overviews.

market_metrics.market_type_summary: Strong growth with high investor and military demand

mortgage_assumptions.defaults_note: Based on March 2026 Oklahoma VA loan rates.

notes: Property taxes and insurance materially affect true monthly ownership cost near Tinker.
Insurance and HOA should be included in all-in housing cost comparisons.

avg_home_mortgage_monthly.notes: VA loan estimate; higher insurance rates due to tornado/storm risks in central Oklahoma.

crime_status.metro_shreveport_bossier: Midwest City and Moore are generally safe; standard urban property crime concerns in OKC proper.

school_quality.on_base: Mid-Del Schools serve the immediate base area.
school_quality.off_base: Moore Public Schools and Choctaw-Nicoma Park Schools are top-tier and highly preferred.

rental_vacancy.notes: Balanced rental market with significant new multi-family inventory.

rental_metrics.notes: Balanced rental market with significant new multi-family inventory.

military_lifestyle_fit.description: OKC is consistently ranked as a top military-friendly city with massive retail and medical support.

financial_brief.affordability_summary: High equity potential due to strong appreciation in the OKC suburbs.
financial_brief.buyer_opportunity: Strongest in Moore, Choctaw, and the growing eastern suburbs.

market_bluf.bluf_summary: Midwest City and Moore offer excellent schools and stable value for military families.

summary_points: Tinker Air Force Base sits in the Midwest City / Moore / Edmond housing market with base-specific affordability, commute, and neighborhood tradeoffs.
Current market trend is approximately 4.1% year-over-year, which should shape buyer leverage and pricing discipline.
High equity potential due to strong appreciation in the OKC suburbs.
Neighborhood quality varies across Midwest City, Moore, Edmond and other nearby corridors — citywide averages should not be the only filter.
Midwest City and Moore offer excellent schools and stable value for military families.
opportunities: Tinker military demand can support durable housing relevance for disciplined buyers and landlords.
Local inventory and pricing may offer opportunity for households that stress-test taxes, insurance, and commute together.
Midwest City and nearby corridors may offer stronger family or value positioning depending on assignment length.
Assignment-length clarity can improve rent-versus-buy decisions near Tinker.
risks: Neighborhood quality, schools, commute, and monthly carrying costs vary across the Midwest City / Moore / Edmond market.
Property taxes, insurance, HOA, and utilities can widen the gap between list price and true monthly payment.
Market averages can hide weak submarkets — property-level review matters.
Stretching beyond a safe housing ratio can reduce PCS flexibility.
buyer_notes: Tinker buyers should compare all-in monthly cost, not just principal and interest.
Verify school zones, commute timing, and BAH fit by exact address before signing.
Strongest in Moore, Choctaw, and the growing eastern suburbs.
This market rewards disciplined buyers who test the commute during expected report hours.
seller_notes: Sellers should price against current inventory and days on market rather than older peak assumptions.
Move-in-ready presentation and realistic pricing matter when buyers have leverage.
Military-adjacent commute convenience can be a listing strength if framed clearly.
investor_angles: Military turnover near Tinker can support rental demand, but vacancy and maintenance should be modeled conservatively.
Investors should underwrite taxes, insurance, HOA, and property condition — not just acquisition price.
Practical commute corridors often outperform generic metro averages for military renter demand.
buyer_guidance: Use all-in monthly payment as the primary screen.
Compare taxes, insurance, commute, school quality, and resale flexibility before locking a neighborhood.
Do not choose housing based only on distance to Tinker.
A slightly lower purchase price can materially improve monthly PCS flexibility.
seller_guidance: Price against active inventory and days on market.
Condition and presentation matter when buyers can compare more options.
Military commute convenience can help positioning if described accurately.
landlord_notes: Military renter demand can improve occupancy durability near Tinker.
Model vacancy, repairs, insurance, and turnover conservatively.
Stable spread matters more than headline affordability alone.

market.market_type_summary: Strong growth with high investor and military demand

base_profile.host_or_major_command: 72nd Air Base Wing / Air Force Materiel Command
base_profile.primary_mission_summary: Tinker AFB is a major depot and sustainment installation in Oklahoma City with strong military-friendly metro amenities.
base_profile.pcs_personality: OKC is consistently ranked as a top military-friendly city with massive retail and medical support.
base_profile.base_bluf: Midwest City and Moore offer excellent schools and stable value for military families.

user_positioning.military_family_bluf: Prioritize school-zone verification, BAH fit, commute testing, childcare access, and total monthly housing cost before signing near Tinker.
user_positioning.single_airman_bluf: Prioritize commute simplicity, affordability, rental flexibility, and access to daily services around Oklahoma City.
user_positioning.realtor_bluf: Lead with BAH realism, commute risk, school-zone confidence, and all-in payment math for Tinker clients — not generic Midwest City / Moore / Edmond stats alone.
user_positioning.investor_bluf: Rental demand near Tinker is influenced by PCS turnover, training/permanent-party mix, and practical commute corridors.

gate_selection_logic: Start with the user's likely duty location.
Identify the most realistic primary gate.
Compare the commute during the user's actual report window.
Do not choose a neighborhood based only on mileage.
commute_intelligence.user_instruction: Before signing a lease or contract, test the commute from the exact property address to the expected gate during the same time window you would normally report to work.

bah_market_reality.bah_bluf: Tinker housing decisions should compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, debt, and commute. BAH is a decision filter, not a promise of affordability.
recommended_calculations: BAH with dependents vs estimated rent
BAH without dependents vs estimated rent
Total housing cost vs 30% income lane
Residual monthly income after expenses and housing
bah_market_reality.base_tab_message: Show BAH as a decision filter for Tinker, not a promise of affordability. Push users into PCSUnited financial calculators when the housing gap looks tight.

family_readiness.family_bluf: Families PCSing to Tinker should verify school zones, childcare options, medical access, commute reality, and housing availability before choosing a neighborhood.

base_profile.disclaimer: PCSUnited is not an official DoD source. This Base tab is intended for public-facing PCS orientation, housing research, and relocation planning. Users should verify gate hours, access requirements, medical services, housing availability, school zones, and official procedures directly with the installation or official service provider before travel, lease signing, or home purchase.

parser_notes: This Tinker AFB file was upgraded to the Lackland-style PCSUnited schema with slug, name, state_code, profile, market_metrics, metrics, ownership_costs, costs, rental_metrics, summary_points, risks, opportunities, buyer_notes, seller_notes, investor_angles, and guidance arrays.
Midwest City / Moore / Edmond is preserved as the surrounding metro/submarket context; base-specific market data was retained.
property_tax_rate and insurance_rate are normalized to decimal form for deterministic math, with percent aliases preserved for display compatibility.

This file now includes base_profile for the PCSUnited Base tab, including gate orientation, visitor control center, major services, on-base housing, recommended nearby neighborhoods, commute intelligence, BAH market guidance, PCS watchouts, and source notes.
